arabic_text:
صمد
احد
لا اله الا الله
alt_text: Numerological teaching diagram: two green boxes show 'صمد' (with abjad value 134) and 'احد' (with value 13). Below: '12 = 1+3+4 + 1+3'. A blue double-arrow at the bottom contains 'لا اله الا الله / 12 Letters', tying the digit-sums to the kalima's 12-letter count.
notes: Numerological link: digit-sums of al-Samad (134→1+3+4=8) and al-Ahad (13→1+3=4), totaling 12 — equal to the kalima's letter count.
